rule: Attacker should succeed when the opposed grapple check equals or exceeds the defender where the rule says attacker equals/exceeds.
currentEvidence: SWSEGrappling.grappleCheck() uses atkRoll.total > defRoll.total and returns on ties.

rule: Grabbed targets cannot move and take -2 to attacks except natural/light weapons; no generic Reflex penalty is part of the baseline Grabbed state.
Pinned prevents actions and removes Dex bonus to Reflex; Pin does not force the target to the bottom of the condition track by itself.
currentEvidence: _applyState('pinned') adds -10 Reflex and overrides system.conditionTrack.current to 5.

rule: Escaping Grabbed, Grappled, and Pinned use different procedures.
currentEvidence: escapeGrapple() uses the same opposed grappleCheck() path and clears both actors on success.

rule: Visible combat actions should route to the canonical grapple state machine.
currentEvidence: Combat action data has Grapple / Grab text but no clear resolutionMode/handler metadata linking to SWSEGrappling.attemptGrab().

rule: Ion applies half damage to HP but compares original pre-halved Ion damage to Damage Threshold.
currentEvidence: DamageResolutionEngine currently appears to resolve from one damage number; ThresholdEngine comment says caller must pass correct Ion damage value.

rule: Special Ion CT/disable effects apply to droids, vehicles, electronic devices, and cybernetically enhanced creatures; not ordinary living creatures.
currentEvidence: No reliable target category/cybernetic eligibility check found in the damage resolution path.

rule: Eligible target moves -2 CT if original Ion damage equals/exceeds DT.
currentEvidence: ThresholdEngine generic threshold starts ctShift at 1; capIonDamageCtToOneStep exists but baseline Ion two-step shift was not found.
